instructions: Generate a Next.js API route handler in pages/api/{name}.ts using TypeScript
Define a typed response interface (e.g. type ResponseData = { ... }) and pass it to NextApiResponse<ResponseData>
Handle each supported HTTP method explicitly via if/switch on req.method
Return 405 Method Not Allowed with { error: 'Method not allowed' } for unhandled methods
Wrap all async logic in try/catch — return 500 with { error: 'Internal server error' } on failure
Note: API routes are excluded from static export (output: 'export') — generated handlers target SSR or serverless deployment
Write unit tests in __tests__/api/{name}.test.ts using Jest + node-mocks-http
Install node-mocks-http as a dev dependency if not present
Tests must cover each HTTP method, error path (500), and invalid method (405)
